arts.ttl: Newcastle United scouts get it spot on as £25m target opens door for fresh transfer swoop
arts.sum: Howe, as ever, continues to stress that profit and sustainability rules are wreaking havoc with Newcastle's ability to spend but with Tomori said to be valued at around £25m, just as team-mate Thiaw was in the summer, you suspect there will be plenty of interest in a cut-price deal of that nature. Tomori has been linked to the Magpies before and publications in Italy this week have suggested Eddie Howe's side, West Ham United and Aston Villa are keen to make a move for the Milan outcast.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa reach agreement with ‘incredibly highly rated’ 21-year-old
arts.sum: Aston Villa have agreed a deal to extend the contract of goalkeeper Filip Marschall, according to reports. Marschall is a product of the Aston Villa youth system but to date, has made just one senior appearance for the club in a 1-1 draw against Zrinjski Mostar in the Uefa Conference League last season. Fixtures Newcastle United Vs. Aston Villa - Thu, Dec 26th 2024, 15:00 Aston Villa continued preparations for Boxing Day on the training field at Bodymoor Heath this week. Unai Emery takes his side to Newcastle United on Thursday, where Villa will be looking for back-to-back Premier League wins. The Villans have been put through their paces over the festive period in preparation for the clash at St. James' Park, where Emery's men could secure a fifth win in six outings in all competitions.
